headline: Hershey Bull Sees World Cup, America 250 Lifting Sales
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Summer events including the FIFA World Cup and America’s 250th anniversary could spur sales of sweet treats, making now a key time to snap up beaten-down shares of Hershey Co., according to the candy and snack maker’s newest Wall Street bull.Most Read from BloombergSingapore Hands Byju's Founder His First Ever Jail TermApple to Overhaul iOS 27 Siri, AI Features: Here's a First PeekCVS Returns Zepbound to Drug Plans After Lilly Slashes PriceSpaceX Said to Cut IPO Value Goal to at L

headline: Hershey's Pricing Power Shines: Can It Offset Cocoa Cost Inflation?
summary: Hershey leans on pricing power as Q1 2026 sales jump 10.6%, but volume slips, and margins tighten under commodity and tariff-related cost pressure.
